evaluation_method: 5 LLM Judges + Minority Override + G4 Originality Detection
campaign: MarbMarket - The First veDEX on MegaETH is Launching
mission: Explain the veDEX Model & Why MarbMarket Matters
best_content:
MarbMarket is dropping the first veDEX on MegaETH. No presale. No VCs. Just a fair launch inspired by Solidly/Aerodrome.

A veDEX isn't your average DEX. Here's how it works: you lock MARB tokens to get veTokens. The longer you lock, the more voting power you have. Every week, veMARB holders vote on which LP pools get rewarded with emissions.

Projects can pay "bribes" to attract votes. This creates a wild incentive loop where liquidity providers get rewards, protocols pay for votes, and MARB lockers collect the benefits. It's a self-sustaining system.

MegaETH needed this. Fair launches matter. Community governance matters. LP farming with actual decentralization matters. @RallyOnChain

The ve(3,3) model is what makes this different. It's not just about locking tokens. It's about creating a system where early adopters aren't punished for participating. Longer locks = more influence + more rewards. No hype, just mechanics.

Check out x.com/Marb_market for the full breakdown. How many veDEX models do you think we'll see before the end of Q2?
qa_comments: Finally a fair launch on MegaETH without all the VC baggage. The ve(3,3) mechanics are exactly what the ecosystem needs right now.
Love seeing a DEX that actually rewards long-term holders with real voting power. Definitely locking some MARB for the max duration.
I bet we see a bunch of teams trying to copy this model before Q2 is over. The bribe system creates such a strong flywheel for liquidity.
